vllm.title: [Misc] Fix skipped max-model-len validation when deriving max model length from tokenizer config
vllm.author: yeqcharlotte
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
_get_and_verify_max_len attempts to derive max_model_len from a few HF configs then applies a bunch of validation.
Overriding max_model_len through tokenizer after the validation is already done causes some validation to be skipped.
Hence, moving that logic to happen before we execute the lo

vllm.title: [TPU] support attention head dim smaller than 128
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
To support models whose head dim is smaller than 128 on TPU.
Note: for head_dim which is a multiply of 128, we will support it in a separate PR.
